oauth2_authorize.description:
Click 'Confirm' to authorize Home Assistant to access your Navimow account.

You will be redirected to the Navimow login page to complete authentication.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication Required
reauth_confirm.description: Your Navimow authentication has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue using the integration.

error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange authorization code for token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Navimow service.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your configuration.
error.missing_config: Missing configuration. Please configure CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET in const.py.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Navimow instance is allowed.

init.title: Navimow Options
init.description: Configure Navimow integration options. GPS calibration (optional): pair two spots' local mower coordinates (position_x/_y or dock_x/_y sensors) with their latitude/longitude to put the mower on the map. All eight fields are required for the tracker.
